response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source leadership, and exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of 5+ years in senior technical leadership at scale-ups, production multi-agent AI systems in fintech, or regulatory AI infrastructure — key requirements for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record building event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions through testing, CI/CD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ with leadership layer development
Minimal mention of real-time credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or financial compliance infrastructure
